introSection: DrageKongen (English: DragonKing) is a steel inverted launched roller coaster located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. It opened on 6 May 2017.
fullText:
DrageKongen (English: DragonKing) is a steel inverted launched roller coaster located at Djurs Sommerland in Nimtofte, Midtjylland, Denmark. It opened on 6 May 2017.



Red track and black supports.
